✈️ Travel Itinerary

  • July 4th - July 10th: Sebastian in South Korea (ICML 2026)
  • July 11th - July 20th: Sebastian in China (IMO 2026)

  • July 25th - August 3rd: Sebastian & Rachel in Japan (Osaka, Kyoto, Hiroshima, Tokyo)

Exploring the vibrant streets of Seoul, where ancient palaces stand next to towering skyscrapers.

The Great Wall and Beijing Nights

Walking the ancient steps of the Great Wall and experiencing the neon glow of modern Beijing.
2026-04-10 Japan
